name: @radzor/structured-output
description: Force LLM responses to match a JSON schema. Wraps OpenAI and Anthropic with schema-validated generation, automatic retry on parse failure, and TypeScript type inference from the schema.

inputs.name: apiKey
inputs.description: API key for the selected provider.

inputs.name: maxRetries
inputs.description: Number of retry attempts if the output fails schema validation.

inputs.name: temperature
inputs.description: Sampling temperature. Defaults to 0 for deterministic structured output.

outputs.name: parsedResult
outputs.description: Validated and type-safe parsed output matching the provided schema.

outputs.name: rawText
outputs.description: Raw LLM response text before parsing.

events.name: onParsed
events.description: Fired when the output is successfully parsed and validated.

events.name: onRetry
events.description: Fired when validation fails and a retry is triggered.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired when all retries are exhausted.

actions.name: generate

params.name: prompt
params.description: User prompt to send to the LLM.

params.name: schema
params.description: JSON Schema object describing the expected output shape.

actions.description: Generate a structured response matching the provided JSON schema.

actions.name: extract

params.name: text
params.description: Source text to extract structured data from.

params.name: schema
params.description: JSON Schema describing the fields to extract.

actions.description: Extract structured fields from unstructured text.

actions.name: classify
actions.returns: Promise<{ label: string; confidence: number; reasoning: string }>
actions.description: Classify text into one of the provided labels with a confidence score.

llm.constraints: Uses OpenAI structured outputs (response_format: json_schema) or Anthropic tool use under the hood. Keep schemas flat where possible — nested objects increase failure rate. temperature defaults to 0 for reliability.
